programme.title: Finding Faith
programme.desc: Victoria, a Christian advice columnist, begins to lose her faith after a series of life events.

programme.title: When Hope Calls Christmas (Part 2)
programme.desc: The residents of Brookfield come together to celebrate Christmas alongside some familiar visitors.

programme.title: A Christmas Blessing
programme.desc: A TV chef is divinely inspired to take over her late aunt's charity.

programme.title: Bringing Christmas Home
programme.desc: A professor teams with a store owner to help track down the original owner of a WWII uniform.

programme.title: Romance at the Vineyard
programme.desc: A woman tries to save her family's vineyard from a wine chain that wants to buy the property.

programme.title: Christmas Keepsake
programme.desc: A father bonds with his daughter while tracking down the original owner of a Christmas time capsule.

programme.title: Someone Like You
programme.desc: After the loss of his best friend, a young architect launches a search for her secret twin sister.

programme.title: A Brush With Christmas
programme.desc: Charlotte discovers her latest painting has been anonymously submitted to an art festival.

programme.title: Just in Time
programme.desc: Hannah receives a call from a stranger, who claims to have discovered an heirloom from her family.

programme.title: Swing Into Romance
programme.desc: A dancer pairs with an unlikely partner, entering a contest to save her family's general store.

programme.title: Home Sweet Christmas
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a woman and a childhood friend after they inherit a patch of sugar maple forest.

programme.title: Christmas on Windmill Way
programme.desc: Mia Miejer learns that her Mimi must sell property which has been in their family for generations.

programme.title: The Engagement Plan
programme.desc: A man's engagement plans get upended when his girlfriend takes him to her family's farm instead.

programme.title: Christmas in the Smokies
programme.desc: A family must save its Smoky Mountains berry farm against all odds.

programme.title: Destined 2: Christmas Once More
programme.desc: Theo continues to miss connecting with his girlfriend, Kim, as he attempts to propose at Christmas.

programme.title: Destined 2: Christmas Once More
programme.desc: Theo continues to miss connecting with his girlfriend, Kim, as he attempts to propose at Christmas.

programme.title: I Heard the Bells
programme.desc: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow puts down his pen after a tragedy, until Christmas reignites his voice.

programme.title: Christmas at the Drive-In
programme.desc: A property lawyer finds romance during the holidays while trying to save her town's local drive-in.

programme.title: When Hope Calls Christmas (Part 1)
programme.desc: The residents of Brookfield come together to celebrate Christmas alongside some familiar visitors.

programme.title: When Hope Calls Christmas (Part 2)
programme.desc: The residents of Brookfield come together to celebrate Christmas alongside some familiar visitors.

programme.title: A Dash of Christmas
programme.desc: An executive learning how to bake inadvertently ends up entered in a Christmas bakeoff.

programme.title: Nothing Is Impossible
programme.desc: A high school janitor gets a second chance at both love and life when he tries out for an NBA team.

programme.title: A Harvest Homecoming
programme.desc: A teacher returns home to help at the family cider mill, where he meets the new marketing manager.

programme.title: A Christmas for the Ages
programme.desc: Four generations of women celebrate Christmas in the style of the 40s, 60s, 90s, and today.

programme.title: Forty-Seven Days With Jesus
programme.desc: A disconnected family finds hope and unity through the story of Jesus' final 47 days on Earth.

programme.title: Harmony From the Heart
programme.desc: Musical therapist Violet and doctor Blake realize that sometimes love is the best medicine of all.

programme.title: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Winemaker
programme.desc: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor springs back into action when her friend is accused of murder.

programme.title: Romance at the Vineyard
programme.desc: A woman tries to save her family's vineyard from a wine chain that wants to buy the property.

programme.title: Someone Like You
programme.desc: After the loss of his best friend, a young architect launches a search for her secret twin sister.

programme.title: Lease on Love
programme.desc: Poppy is a marketing specialist who fakes an engagement with her boss's handsome new client Milo.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: A businessman struggles to give up control of his daughter and trust God with her future.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: A businessman struggles to give up control of his daughter and trust God with her future.

programme.title: Let It Snow
programme.desc: An executive with plans to update a rustic lodge has a change of heart when she falls in love.

programme.title: When Hope Calls Christmas (Part 1)
programme.desc: The residents of Brookfield come together to celebrate Christmas alongside some familiar visitors.

programme.title: A Christmas Blessing
programme.desc: A TV chef is divinely inspired to take over her late aunt's charity.

programme.title: 'Twas the Text Before Christmas
programme.desc: A text message mistakenly sent to Addie leads to a friendship with the sender and a budding romance.
